TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lionel_Billingy, title = Lionel_Billingy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lionel_Billingy} }

S.FORM: Lionel Billingy sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 8, Lionel Billingy, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Lionel Billingy sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1952, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 8, Lionel Billingy, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lionel βilliŋj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lionel βilliŋj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
